data.title: NopalCyber recognized as Top 250 Global MSSP for 2nd year by MSSP Alert, an elite group in cybersecurity.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on January 19, 2026, NopalCyber has been recognized as one of the Top 250 Managed Security Service Providers (MSSPs) globally by MSSP Alert, a renowned industry authority under CyberRisk Alliance. This prestigious acknowledgment positions NopalCyber within a select group of worldwide MSSPs, reflecting their exceptional standing in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: Maybelline New York appoints Chinese boys group Teens in Times (TNT) as Brand Ambassadors and Global Partners.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in Shanghai, Maybelline New York, a top makeup brand, revealed the selection of Chinese group Teens in Times (TNT) as their latest Brand Ambassadors and Global Partners. The partnership between the two signifies a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: Rokid Ai Glasses Style now globally available, priced from $299, shipping worldwide, includes ChatGPT, Qwen, DeepSeek.
data.description: Rokid, a global leader in AI technology, has introduced the world's initial open ecosystem AI smart glasses. These innovative glasses, tailored for use with ChatGPT, Qwen, DeepSeek, and other programs, are ultra-lightweight, prioritize prescription needs, and are now available for shipment worldwide. The glasses are priced at $299 and can be purchased from various locations. This development was announced on January 19, 2026, in San Francisco.

data.title: Register for Asia's top hospitality trade fair, HSP 2026 in Shanghai happening from March 31 to April 3 at Shanghai New International Expo Center.
data.description: From March 31 to April 3, 2026, the Shanghai New International Expo Center will host Hotel & Shop Plus (HSP), the prime trade fair for the hospitality and commercial space sector in Asia. The event is organized by IM Sinoexpo and is expected to showcase the latest trends and innovations in the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin's fundamentals improving as spot volumes rise and sell pressure eases; however, demand weakens with price below $93k.
data.description: Recent data from Glassnode indicates that the spot volumes for Bitcoin have been increasing, while the selling pressure on the cryptocurrency has been decreasing. However, the demand for Bitcoin is still fragile as its value dropped below $93,000. This information suggests that there is a potential shift in the market dynamics surrounding Bitcoin, with trading activity on the rise despite the unstable demand for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Greenland Resources partners with GMH Gruppe for molybdenum supply; Project in Greenland recognized by EU. TSX:MOLY.
data.description: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (TSX:MOLY, FSE:M0LY) is excited to share that following the European Commission's presentation of RESourceEU on December 3, 2025, naming the Company's Malmbjerg project in Greenland as a key EU project, they have entered into a memorandum of understanding (MOU) for extended molybdenum supply with GMH Gruppe SE & Co. KG (GMH), a top European producer.

data.title: Glassnode data: Bitcoin spot volumes rise, sell pressure eases. Demand fragile as Bitcoin drops below $93K.
data.description: Recent statistics from Glassnode reveal an increase in Bitcoin spot volumes, indicating growing trading activity. There has been a reduction in sell pressure, suggesting a more stable market environment. However, the demand for Bitcoin remains fragile as its value dropped below $93,000. These trends highlight the complex dynamics influencing the current state of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Elon Musk jokes about buying Ryanair, saying he'll appoint a "Ryan" to lead the airline, calls it "your destiny."
data.description: Billionaire entrepreneur and Tesla Inc.'s CEO Elon Musk recently made a playful remark about potentially acquiring Ryanair Holdings PLC. Musk jokingly mentioned appointing a "Ryan" to lead the airline in a social media post. He responded to Ryanair's dismissal of Wi-Fi on planes, hinting at his Starlink satellite internet service. Musk tweeted about the cost of buying Ryanair and expressed his desire to have a "Ryan" in charge of the airline after acquisition, stating, "It is your destiny." The interaction took place on January 19, 2026. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trading volume for memecoin briefly surged to $5.6 billion on Monday, as analysts note a slowdown in speculative activity.
data.description: Trading activity for Memecoin experienced a temporary surge on Monday, reaching a peak trading volume of $5.6 billion. Analysts speculate that the hype surrounding memecoins may have subsided, leading to a decrease in speculative trading.
